title: Eriosorus rufescens

intro: Eriosorus rufescens is a medicinal plant species native to the Andean region, commonly known as a species of the genus of flowering plants in the family Compositae, but more specifically it is classified within the family Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues and reduce inflammation, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
